description_en: Create a traditional Chinese style table lamp with a wooden base and a bamboo shade. The lamp should have intricate carvings and a classic lantern design.

components.name: wooden_base
components.description: The wooden base of the lamp

components.name: bamboo_shade
components.description: The bamboo shade for the lamp

components.name: carving
components.description: Intricate carvings on the wooden base

components.name: light_bulb_holder
components.description: The holder for the light bulb

style_notes: The lamp should reflect traditional Chinese design elements, with a focus on symmetry and intricate wood carvings. The joinery should be precise, showcasing traditional Chinese craftsmanship. The proportions should be balanced, with the height of the lamp being approximately 1.5 times the diameter of the base.
